title: Integrate OpenAI API in a Next.js project
summary: Set up the OpenAI SDK in Next.js with streaming chat completions, structured outputs, function calling, and production error handling.
declaration: I will integrate the OpenAI API into this project using the official openai SDK. This covers chat completions with streaming, structured outputs (JSON mode), function calling, and proper error handling. I'll need an OpenAI API key. If you'd prefer an abstraction layer that supports multiple AI providers, consider the Vercel AI SDK instead.
